Classification:  wordpress_probe
Severity:        MEDIUM
Description:     Unauthenticated scans of WordPress attack surfaces: wp-login.php, xmlrpc.php, wp-json REST API, wp-admin PHP endpoints, and theme/plugin PHP files — not authenticated admin sessions or honeypot operator traffic.
